sglang.title: [quantization] AWQ Marlin doesn't work when dtype is bfloat16
sglang.author: kevin85421
sglang.bodyExcerpt:
Motivation
In moe_wna16_marlin_gemm, it implicitly assumes that a and b_scales are both half or both bfloat16. If the types are inconsistent, PyTorch will raise a RuntimeError when calling b_scales.data_ptr<at::Half>() or b_scales.data_ptr<at::BFloat16>().

b_scales is created by AWQMoEMethod.create

sglang.title: [HiCache]Page head layout IO kernel
sglang.author: huangtingwei9988
sglang.bodyExcerpt:
Motivation
In the HiCacheStorage, for the MHA model, because the tp_size of the p node and the d node are different, the kv cache of the D node offload cannot be hit and used by the P node.
This PR introduces a new layout in memory_pool_host to support KV cache sharing between nodes with different T

sglang.title: Avoid using flashinfer_allreduce_fusion when dp attention is enabled.
sglang.author: elfiegg
sglang.bodyExcerpt:
Motivation
There are a few functional bugs related to --enable-flashinfer-allreduce-fusion
#9061
#8689
From the profile, it seems DP attention would have communication pattern like add + rmsnorm + allreduce instead of allreduce + add + rmsnorm that's supported by Flashinfer's trtllm_allreduce_fusion

sglang.author: ash-sigh
sglang.bodyExcerpt:
Motivation

related to #11046
Modifications

The mrope_position_delta  is transferred to the device during the first run to avoid subsequent host-to-device transfers for decode performance improvement of multi-modality models.

Ascend NPU:
# launch_server :
export HCCL_OP_EXPANSION_MO

sglang.author: CatherineSue
sglang.bodyExcerpt:
Motivation

The /v1/responses endpoint implementation in gRPC was suffering from two main issues:

Parameter bloat: Handler functions were passing 10+ parameters, triggering clippy::too_many_arguments warnings and making the code difficult to read and maintain.
Inconsistent error handling: The pipel

sglang.title: [router] Remove SharedXxxStorage type aliases to make Arc explicit
sglang.author: CatherineSue
sglang.bodyExcerpt:
Motivation

The type aliases SharedResponseStorage, SharedConversationStorage, and SharedConversationItemStorage were hiding the Arc wrapper in their definitions:
pub type SharedResponseStorage = Arc<dyn ResponseStorage>;
This created two problems:

Easy to double-wrap Arc - Developers unfamiliar wi

vllm.title: [Performance][LoRA] add context varying params to 'do_not_specialize' in fused moe lora
vllm.author: gnovack
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
Purpose
The values of several args of _fused_moe_lora_kernel depend on the input context length. This causes recompilation of the kernel during runtime when new context lengths are seen for the first time, significantly degrading TTFT on long contexts which aren't captured by cuda graphs.
This addre
